reason: All 4 round-2 gaps verified fixed. 21 FRs traceable to KPIs, no contradictions, edge cases covered. 1 low-severity FR-19 JSON inconsistency (missing rate-limiter step in condensed desc). Non-blocking.

gaps.description: FR-19 JSON block description (line 284) omits 'rate limiter check' step that was added to the table in GAP-07 fix. JSON says 'webhook verify → parse → sanitize → PII mask → knowledge match → escalate → respond → log' (8 steps) but table has 10 steps including rate limiter at position 2.
gaps.recommendation: Update FR-19 JSON description to include rate limiter: 'webhook verify → rate limit → parse → sanitize → PII mask → knowledge match → escalate → respond → log'.
